name: Celebrity Weddings
description: Who married whom — Hollywood unions, royal vows, and rocker tabloid pairings.

questions.q: Who did Jessica Simpson marry in 2002?

source.notes: Marriage chronicled on MTV's Newlyweds. Divorced 2006.

questions.q: Kerry Washington's husband Nnamdi Asomugha played which professional sport?

source.notes: Asomugha was an NFL cornerback for Oakland, Philadelphia, and San Francisco.

questions.q: Kaitlin Olson married which co-star from 'It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia' in 2008?

source.notes: McElhenney is the show's creator. Their characters Mac and Dee are also married on the show (briefly).

questions.q: Who did Mariah Carey marry in 2008?

source.notes: Married April 30, 2008; divorced 2016.

questions.q: Jason Momoa married which 'Cosby Show' star in 2017?

source.notes: Original answer dated their relationship to 2007 — they began dating then but were officially married in 2017.

questions.q: Rachel Weisz married which James Bond actor in 2011?

source.notes: Married in a small ceremony in New York.

questions.q: Carla Bruni married which French president in 2008?

source.notes: Bruni was a top model and singer-songwriter before becoming First Lady of France.

questions.q: Lisa Marie Presley was briefly married to which Oscar-winning actor in 2002?

source.notes: Married August 2002, divorced 2004 (separated within months).

questions.q: Avril Lavigne married the lead singer of which band in 2013?

source.notes: Married Chad Kroeger; divorced 2015.

questions.q: Burlesque model Dita Von Teese married which shock rocker in 2005?

source.notes: Married 2005, divorced 2007.

questions.q: In what year did Madonna marry director Guy Ritchie?

source.notes: Married December 22, 2000 at Skibo Castle in Scotland; divorced 2008.

questions.q: Chrissy Teigen married which Grammy-winning musician in 2013?

source.notes: Met on the set of Legend's 'Stereo' music video in 2006.

questions.q: Halle Berry married which French actor in 2013?

source.notes: Married 2013, divorced 2016.

questions.q: Rod Stewart married which model in 2007?

source.notes: Lancaster is Rod Stewart's third wife.

questions.q: Anna Faris married which 'Parks and Recreation' alum in 2009?

source.notes: Married 2009, divorced 2018.

questions.q: Kate Middleton married Prince William at Westminster Abbey in what year?

source.notes: April 29, 2011 — watched by an estimated 2 billion people worldwide.

questions.q: Maria Shriver was previously married to which action-movie star turned politician?

source.notes: Married 1986, separated 2011 after Arnold's affair scandal.

questions.q: Julia Roberts married Danny Moder, who worked on movie sets as what?

source.notes: Met on the set of 'The Mexican' (2001); married 2002.

questions.q: LeAnn Rimes married which actor in 2011 after a tabloid affair?

source.notes: The two met on the set of a Lifetime movie while both were married to other people.

questions.q: 'Survivor' producer Mark Burnett married which actress in 2007?

source.notes: Downey is best known as Monica from 'Touched by an Angel'.

questions.q: Which prince did Meghan Markle marry at Windsor Castle in 2018?
Beyonce married which rapper and music mogul in 2008?
Kim Kardashian married which rapper in 2014 (a union that lasted until their 2021 split)?
Who did Brad Pitt marry in 2000 before they divorced in 2005?
Which singer married Justin Bieber in a 2018 ceremony, later celebrated again in 2019?
Will Smith married which actress in 1997?
Tom Cruise married which actress in 2006 in a lavish Italian castle wedding?
David Beckham married which Spice Girl in 1999?
Ashton Kutcher married which actress in 2005, a marriage that ended in divorce in 2013?
Who did Priscilla marry in 1967 at the Aladdin Hotel in Las Vegas?
George Clooney married which human-rights lawyer in Venice in 2014?
Pink (Alecia Moore) married which motocross racer in 2006?
Salma Hayek married which French billionaire businessman in 2009?
Reese Witherspoon married talent agent Jim Toth in 2011, after divorcing which actor?
Actress Grace Kelly gave up Hollywood when she married which European monarch in 1956?
Director Tim Burton's longtime partner in the 1990s, Lisa Marie, was succeeded by which actress he later partnered and worked with frequently?
Country star Tim McGraw married which fellow country singer in 1996?
Actor Humphrey Bogart married which actress, his fourth wife, in 1945 at writer Louis Bromfield's farm?
Singer Gwen Stefani married which Bush frontman in 2002 before their 2016 divorce?
Actress Elizabeth Taylor married which actor twice, first in 1964 and again in 1975?
Paul McCartney married which photographer in 1969, his first wife who later founded a vegetarian food brand?
Actress Audrey Hepburn married which Italian psychiatrist in 1969, her second husband?
Comedian and 'Modern Family' actress Sofia Vergara married which 'Magic Mike' actor in 2015?
Marilyn Monroe married which baseball legend in 1954, a marriage that lasted just nine months?
Singer Mick Jagger's first wife, whom he married in 1971 in Saint-Tropez, was which Nicaraguan-born socialite?
